question: What is a bowling release?
content:
Mini-drill: Practice releasing the ball consistently at the bottom of your forward swing arc, focusing on the feeling of letting go at the same point relative to your sliding bowling shoe each time.
We suggest you practice your swing at the foul line, with no steps. That allows you to focuse on it without any distractions. Once your release feels in control, you can start adding some reverse bowling into it.
